title: VETERAN SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: CENTRAL OREGON VETERANS RANCH VETERAN SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support groups and Alcohol Anonymous meetings. 65920 SW 61st Street Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Must be a veteran Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 706-9062 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 706-9062 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes, Jefferson, and Crook Counties Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Support Groups * Veterans In Person Support Groups * Veterans Mental Health Related Support Groups * Veterans Military Family Support Groups * Veterans Veteran Support Groups * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - VETERANS AND FAMILY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRAL OREGON VETERANS RANCH
